item.title: Snorkeling in Mexico
item.description: Join a snorkeling adventure in Mexico and enjoy the clear water, coastal scenery, and a relaxing travel moment.

item.title: Trying Food in New York
item.description: Ken and Carol sample classic New York foods during a relaxed city visit, highlighting local flavors and memorable travel moments.

item.title: First Taste of French Street Food
item.description: Ken and Carol try French street food for the first time and share a relaxed food travel moment from France.

item.title: Half-Pound Burger at a Local Eatery
item.description: Ken and Carol enjoy a half-pound burger at a local eatery, sharing a simple food stop from their travel adventures.
